Price Cuts Aren't
the Answer.
Positioning Is.

38 days on market with a price reduction and AS-IS terms doesn't mean the home is overpriced — it means it's been under-positioned and under-marketed. The Collective changes that with two concrete strategies: maximize value through proper listing, OR provide a clean cash exit. Either way, you move forward today.

Two Strategies · One Team · Your Choice

We Come With
Options, Not Just a Listing Agreement.

Most agents walk in with one play: list it. The Collective walks in with two. We've analyzed this property, the market, and your situation — and we're ready to deploy whichever path serves you best.

✦ Strategy A · Maximize Value
Full Listing Revamp & Relaunch
Transform, stage, photograph, and relaunch this home with fresh eyes, fresh marketing, and The Collective's AI buyer-targeting system. Get top dollar.
Complete furniture removal & donation coordination — we handle everything
Professional staging that reveals the two-story ceilings and brick fireplace as the showpieces they are
Gallery-quality photography + professional video walkthrough + drone aerial
Meta Facebook & Instagram paid ad campaign targeting buyers in 75-mile radius
AI buyer-targeting across 40+ platforms — deployed day we go live
Fresh MLS narrative: Red Mountain Ranch lifestyle, vaulted ceilings, balcony views, no longer "AS-IS"
Performance-based commission — we earn more when you sell for more
$739k+
Target sale price · properly staged & positioned
💵 Strategy B · Clean Exit
Cash Offer · As-Is · Fast Close
If the priority is speed, certainty, and zero hassle — The Collective can connect you with a cash offer. No staging. No showings. No contingencies. Just done.
Cash offer submitted within 48–72 hours of your decision — no waiting on lender approval
True AS-IS purchase — no repairs, no inspection negotiations, no requests
Closing in as little as 14–21 days — or on your timeline
Zero showings, zero open houses, zero staging required
No commission on buyer side — simplified transaction
Seller stays in home post-close if needed — leaseback options available
Proceeds in hand quickly — stop the monthly carry cost immediately
14 Days
To close · cash offer · zero hassle
The Bottom Line

You reached out. We responded. Now you have two paths forward — both lead to a closed transaction. The only wrong move is waiting another 30 days without making a decision. Which strategy works for you?

Let's Talk Today →
Why The Collective · 15 Years · Investors + Agents

You Don't Have to Feel Stuck.
We're Not Regular Realtors.

Most agents hand you a listing agreement and a lockbox. The Collective hands you a full team — investors, concierge coordinators, staging professionals, licensed contractors, and marketing specialists — all under one roof. After 15 years in this market, we've seen every situation. We've solved every situation. You are not stuck.

Who We Are

Agents Who Are Investors.
Investors Who Understand People.

The Collective was built on a simple idea: sellers deserve more than a yard sign and a prayer. We are a team of licensed real estate professionals who are also active investors — which means we have real capital, real contractor relationships, and real staging resources that we deploy on every listing, every time.

After 15 years in the Arizona market, we've seen the crash of 2008, the frenzy of 2021, and everything in between. We know what sells. We know what doesn't. And we know how to structure a deal that protects your interests regardless of what the market is doing when you need to move.

✓ Licensed Agents ✓ Active Investors ✓ Cash Buyers ✓ 15 Years Arizona ✓ Red Mountain Ranch Experts
🏡
Traditional Listing
Stage it, shoot it, market it everywhere. MLS + Meta + AI targeting. Maximum exposure, maximum price.
💵
Cash Purchase
We buy it ourselves. AS-IS. No showings. No repairs. Close in 14 days. We have the capital and we deploy it fast.
🤝
Creative Finance
Seller carry, subject-to, hybrid structures — we know how to build deals that work for both sides when traditional paths don't fit.
🔧
Full Concierge
Cleaners, movers, stagers, contractors — all coordinated by us. You make one call. We manage everything else to closing.
The Concierge Experience · What We Handle So You Don't Have To

From Your First Call to
Keys at the Closing Table.

This is what separates The Collective from every other team in the Valley. We don't just list homes — we prepare them, protect them, and position them. Every service below is coordinated by us and deployed at the right time in the right sequence.

🧹
Deep Clean & Prep

Professional cleaning crew in before any stager sets foot in the home. Windows, baseboards, appliances, every surface. We hire the crew, we schedule it, we inspect the result.

We Handle It · Day 2
🛋️
Furniture Removal & Donation

We list sellable furniture on Facebook Marketplace, coordinate buyer pickups, and schedule Habitat for Humanity or St. Vincent donation runs for the rest. Nothing goes to waste, nothing sits on your plate.

We Handle It · Days 2–5
✨
Professional Staging

Our staging team brings in furniture, art, linens, and accessories calibrated to your buyer demographic. The soaring ceilings, brick fireplace, and balcony become the stars they were always meant to be.

We Handle It · Days 5–8
🔧
Licensed Contractor Network

Touch-up paint, fixture swaps, minor repairs, landscaping refresh — we have trusted licensed contractors on speed dial who show up, do the work, and leave the home better. No chasing vendors on your end.

We Handle It · As Needed
📦
Pack, Move & Storage

If you need to be out before close, we coordinate moving crews and short-term storage. You tell us where things go. We make sure they get there. Timing is synced to the close date.

We Handle It · Your Timeline
🌿
Landscaping & Curb Appeal

First impressions are set before anyone walks through the door. We coordinate a landscaping refresh — trimming, fresh gravel, weed removal, outdoor lighting check — timed to photography day.

We Handle It · Day 8
📸
Gallery Photography + Video + Drone

Professional photographer, videographer, and drone operator — all scheduled for the same day after staging is complete. Day shot, golden hour, twilight sequence. Every angle of the property documented for maximum impact.

We Handle It · Day 9
📱
Digital Marketing Launch

MLS live, single property website live, Meta paid ad campaign active, AI buyer targeting across 40+ platforms — all deployed on the same morning. Buyers see this home before they know they're looking for it.

We Handle It · Day 10
🤝
Offer Negotiation & Close

Every offer reviewed, every term negotiated with your bottom line as the only objective. We advocate hard, communicate clearly, and get you to the closing table on time with proceeds in hand.

We Handle It · Close Day
You Make One Call.
We Handle Everything Else.

No chasing vendors. No coordinating strangers. No second-guessing timelines. The Collective becomes your single point of contact from the moment you decide to move forward until the wire hits your account.

Our Deployment Plan · Starting Day One

Here's Exactly What We Do
The Moment You Choose Us.

Whether you choose Strategy A or Strategy B — The Collective becomes your project management team from day one. Every vendor, every timeline, every moving part is handled by us.

01
🤝

Strategy Decision

We sit down, review both paths with real numbers, and you choose: List It for max value, or Cash Offer for clean exit. Either way, we execute immediately.

Day 1
02
🛋

Furniture Clearout

Full furniture removal — Facebook Marketplace listing, estate sale facilitation, and donation pickups. The home gets cleared to reveal its extraordinary architectural bones.

Days 2–7
03
✨

Professional Staging

Our staging team transforms the great room, primary suite, kitchen, and outdoor spaces. The two-story brick fireplace and soaring ceilings become the stars they should be.

Days 5–8
04
🎬

Video · Photography · Drone

Professional walkthrough video, gallery-quality photography, aerial drone footage showing the 0.22-acre lot, balcony, and Red Mountain Ranch neighborhood context.

Day 9
05
📱

Meta Digital Campaign

Facebook and Instagram paid ads targeting qualified buyers in a 75-mile radius. Custom audiences, retargeting pixels, and lookalike buyer modeling — live on day 10.

Day 10 · Live
06
🏘

Red Mountain Ranch Lifestyle Campaign

We sell the neighborhood — Usery Mountain trails, Saguaro Lake, golf courses, A-rated schools. Buyers moving from Scottsdale and East Valley pay a premium for this location.

Day 10 · Live
07
🎯

AI Buyer Targeting

Our AI system identifies the most likely buyers for this property profile — 5BR, 3-car garage, Red Mountain Ranch, vaulted ceilings — and targets them across 40+ platforms.

Day 10 · Live
08
📊

Weekly Reporting

Real-time dashboard every week — digital ad impressions, showing requests, comp updates, and active buyer inquiries. Full transparency, no guesswork.

Every Week
09
🤝

Offer · Negotiate · Close

Tarah and Amanda negotiate every offer with your bottom line in mind. Performance-based commission means we earn more when you sell for more. Total alignment.

Target: Day 30

Financial Scenarios · Side by Side

Three Paths.
One Right Answer for You.

Here is an honest look at each option — listing with The Collective for max value, taking a cash offer, or continuing to hold. The numbers tell the story.

✦ Strategy A — List & Sell with The Collective
⚠ Pool comps $640–699k · No-pool staged ceiling: $630,000

Timeline~30–45 days
Estimated Net~$589,300
💵 Strategy B — The Collective Buys It · Full Cash
Our Cash Offer · AS-IS$445,000
No Staging Required$0
Reduced/No CommissionVaries
Closing CostsMinimal
Timeline14–21 days
You Walk With~$442,000
🤝 Strategy C — Seller Carry Note
Our Purchase Price$500,000
You Carry Short-Term Note3–6 Months
Monthly Interest (8–10%)+$3,333–5,000/mo
Staging / Repairs / Commission$0 — None
Private Transaction · No MLS✓
Estimated Total Net~$510–530k

⚠ The gap between Strategy A (~$702k net) and Option C (declining daily) widens by approximately $1,400/week. Every week of inaction is a real cost — not a hypothetical one.

Red Mountain Ranch · Lifestyle Marketing

We Sell the Neighborhood.
Not Just the Address.

Buyers moving from Scottsdale and the East Valley know Red Mountain Ranch. We make sure they know YOUR home is in it — and everything that comes with that address.

⛰️

Usery Mountain Park

World-class hiking, mountain biking, and archery range minutes away. A major draw for active buyers from Scottsdale and Paradise Valley.

~10 min · Premier Recreation
🚤

Saguaro Lake

Boating, fishing, paddleboarding, and stunning Salt River scenery just 20 minutes from the front door. An easy sell for lifestyle-motivated buyers.

~20 min · Lake Recreation
⛳

Red Mountain Ranch Country Club

Resident-adjacent golf, tennis, pool, and dining. A key lifestyle differentiator that commands premium pricing vs. comparable homes in other parts of Mesa.

Walking Distance · Club Amenities
🏫

A-Rated Schools

Mesa Unified and Gilbert-area A-rated schools serve this neighborhood. A top search filter for families relocating from Scottsdale, Gilbert, and Chandler.

District-Served · Top Rated
🛍️

Eastmark · Superstition Springs

Top-tier retail, dining, and entertainment just minutes away. Full-service Mesa living without the congestion. We feature this in every buyer-facing ad.

~12 min · Dining & Retail
🌄

Red Mountain Views

The Superstition Mountains and Red Mountain backdrop are visible from the balcony — a premium visual asset that we feature prominently in drone footage and Meta ads.

Balcony Views · Drone Feature
